revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{template shortcut|cns|cn span|cn-span|Fact span|Fact-span|Reference necessary}} == Usage == The {{tl|citation needed span}} template may be used when there is unsourced text that should be [[WP:CITE|attributed to a reference citation]]. Unlike the template {{tl|citation needed}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging a block of ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing citation, and for singling out ''a specific fact'' that is unsourced among many sourced ones. Avoid use for multiple paragraphs or around a list without closing and opening each template around each paragraph or list item. This kind of use causes [[WP:LINT|linting errors]] and may disrupt the page display. An alternative with multiple paragraphs is {{tlx|unreferenced|section}} or {{tlx|more citations needed|section}}. Once a citation is added, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :{{tlx|citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage(s) to be sourced}}, or: :{{tlx|citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|text=Passage(s) to be sourced}} The date is optional, so the minimal syntax is: :{{tlx|citation needed span|Passage(s) to be sourced}} '''Example of usage:''' :Sourced material. {{tlx|citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be sourced. Another passage to be sourced.}} More sourced material. :Sourced material. {{citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be sourced. Another passage to be sourced.}} More sourced material. '''Compare usage of {{tl|citation needed}}:''' :Sourced material. Passage to be sourced.{{tlx|Citation needed}} Another passage to be sourced.{{tlx|Citation needed}} More sourced material. :Sourced material. Passage to be sourced.{{Citation needed}} Another passage to be sourced.{{Citation needed}} More sourced material. === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}} (or no parameter): The unreferenced content that needs a citation. ;{{para|date}}: The date in the form {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. If omitted, {{U|AnomieBOT}} will add it if there are no new edits for a few minutes. ;{{para|reason}}: The reason for the citation request. If omitted, "This claim needs references to reliable sources." will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "text": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "description": "The text needing a citation", "type": "content", "required": true, "label": "Text", "autovalue": "" }, "reason": { "description": "Reason the text needs a citation; shown in a tooltip", "type": "string", "default": "This claim needs references to reliable sources", "suggested": true, "label": "Reason?" }, "date": { "description": "Month and year the tag was added", "example": "June 2015", "type": "date", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true, "label": "Date" } }, "description": "Marks a specific piece of text as needing a citation.", "paramOrder": [ "text", "date", "reason" ], "format": "inline" } == Categorization of articles == Adding this template to an article places the article into [[:Category:All articles with unsourced statements]], [[:Category:Articles with unsourced statements]], and/or dated subcategories thereof. == Redirects to this template == * {{tl|cns}} * {{tl|cspan}} * {{tl|cnspan}} * {{tl|fact span}} * {{tl|citation span}} * {{tl|citations needed span}} == See also == * {{tl|Citation needed}} – equivalent which does not precisely identify the problematic text * {{tl|Unreferenced section}} – for entire sections requiring [[WP:V|verifiable]] [[WP:RS|references]] / [[WP:CITE|citations]] {{Inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{template shortcut|cns|cn span|cn-span|Fact span|Fact-span|Reference necessary}} == Usage == The {{tl|citation needed span}} template may be used when there is unsourced text that should be [[WP:CITE|attributed to a reference citation]]. Unlike the template {{tl|citation needed}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging a block of ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing citation, and for singling out ''a specific fact'' that is unsourced among many sourced ones. Avoid use for multiple paragraphs or around a list without closing and opening each template around each paragraph or list item. This kind of use causes [[WP:LINT|linting errors]] and may disrupt the page display. An alternative with multiple paragraphs is {{tlx|unreferenced|section}} or {{tlx|more citations needed|section}}. Once a citation is added, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :{{tlx|citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage(s) to be sourced}}, or: :{{tlx|citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|text=Passage(s) to be sourced}} The date is optional, so the minimal syntax is: :{{tlx|citation needed span|Passage(s) to be sourced}} '''Example of usage:''' :Sourced material. {{tlx|citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be sourced. Another passage to be sourced.}} More sourced material. :Sourced material. {{citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be sourced. Another passage to be sourced.}} More sourced material. '''Compare usage of {{tl|citation needed}}:''' :Sourced material. Passage to be sourced.{{tlx|Citation needed}} Another passage to be sourced.{{tlx|Citation needed}} More sourced material. :Sourced material. Passage to be sourced.{{Citation needed}} Another passage to be sourced.{{Citation needed}} More sourced material. === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}} (or no parameter): The unreferenced content that needs a citation. ;{{para|date}}: The date in the form {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. If omitted, {{U|AnomieBOT}} will add it if there are no new edits for a few minutes. ;{{para|reason}}: The reason for the citation request. If omitted, "This claim needs references to reliable sources." will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "text": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "description": "The text needing a citation", "type": "content", "required": true, "label": "Text", "autovalue": "" }, "reason": { "description": "Reason the text needs a citation; shown in a tooltip", "type": "string", "default": "This claim needs references to reliable sources", "suggested": true, "label": "Reason?" }, "date": { "description": "Month and year the tag was added", "example": "June 2015", "type": "date", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true, "label": "Date" } }, "description": "Marks a specific piece of text as needing a citation.", "paramOrder": [ "text", "date", "reason" ], "format": "inline" } == Categorization of articles == Adding this template to an article places the article into [[:Category:All articles with unsourced statements]], [[:Category:Articles with unsourced statements]], and/or dated subcategories thereof. == Redirects to this template == * {{tl|cns}} * {{tl|cspan}} * {{tl|cnspan}} * {{tl|fact span}} * {{tl|citation span}} * {{tl|citations needed span}} == See also == * {{tl|Citation needed}} – equivalent which does not precisely identify the problematic text * {{tl|Unreferenced section}} – for entire sections requiring [[WP:V|verifiable]] [[WP:RS|references]] / [[WP:CITE|citations]] {{Inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{template shortcut|cns|cn span|cn-span|Fact span|Fact-span|Reference necessary}} == Usage == The {{tl|citation needed span}} template may be used when there is unsourced text that should be [[WP:CITE|attributed to a reference citation]]. Unlike the template {{tl|citation needed}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging a block of ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing citation, and for singling out ''a specific fact'' that is unsourced among many sourced ones. Avoid use for multiple paragraphs or around a list without closing and opening each template around each paragraph or list item. This kind of use causes [[WP:LINT|linting errors]] and may disrupt the page display. An alternative with multiple paragraphs is {{tlx|unreferenced|section}} or {{tlx|more citations needed|section}}. Once a citation is added, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :{{tlx|citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage(s) to be sourced}}, or: :{{tlx|citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|text=Passage(s) to be sourced}} The date is optional, so the minimal syntax is: :{{tlx|citation needed span|Passage(s) to be sourced}} '''Example of usage:''' :Sourced material. {{tlx|citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be sourced. Another passage to be sourced.}} More sourced material. :Sourced material. {{citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be sourced. Another passage to be sourced.}} More sourced material. '''Compare usage of {{tl|citation needed}}:''' :Sourced material. Passage to be sourced.{{tlx|Citation needed}} Another passage to be sourced.{{tlx|Citation needed}} More sourced material. :Sourced material. Passage to be sourced.{{Citation needed}} Another passage to be sourced.{{Citation needed}} More sourced material. === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}} (or no parameter): The unreferenced content that needs a citation. ;{{para|date}}: The date in the form {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. If omitted, {{U|AnomieBOT}} will add it if there are no new edits for a few minutes. ;{{para|reason}}: The reason for the citation request. If omitted, "This claim needs references to reliable sources." will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "text": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "description": "The text needing a citation", "type": "content", "required": true, "label": "Text", "autovalue": "" }, "reason": { "description": "Reason the text needs a citation; shown in a tooltip", "type": "string", "default": "This claim needs references to reliable sources", "suggested": true, "label": "Reason?" }, "date": { "description": "Month and year the tag was added", "example": "June 2015", "type": "date", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true, "label": "Date" } }, "description": "Marks a specific piece of text as needing a citation.", "paramOrder": [ "text", "date", "reason" ], "format": "inline" } == Categorization of articles == Adding this template to an article places the article into [[:Category:All articles with unsourced statements]], [[:Category:Articles with unsourced statements]], and/or dated subcategories thereof. == Redirects to this template == * {{tl|cns}} * {{tl|cspan}} * {{tl|cnspan}} * {{tl|fact span}} * {{tl|citation span}} * {{tl|citations needed span}} == See also == * {{tl|Citation needed}} – equivalent which does not precisely identify the problematic text * {{tl|Unreferenced section}} – for entire sections requiring [[WP:V|verifiable]] [[WP:RS|references]] / [[WP:CITE|citations]] {{Inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{template shortcut|cns|cn span|cn-span|Fact span|Fact-span|Reference necessary}} == Usage == The {{tl|citation needed span}} template may be used when there is unsourced text that should be [[WP:CITE|attributed to a reference citation]]. Unlike the template {{tl|citation needed}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging a block of ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing citation, and for singling out ''a specific fact'' that is unsourced among many sourced ones. Avoid use for multiple paragraphs or around a list without closing and opening each template around each paragraph or list item. This kind of use causes [[WP:LINT|linting errors]] and may disrupt the page display. An alternative with multiple paragraphs is {{tlx|unreferenced|section}} or {{tlx|more citations needed|section}}. Once a citation is added, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :{{tlx|citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage(s) to be sourced}}, or: :{{tlx|citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|text=Passage(s) to be sourced}} The date is optional, so the minimal syntax is: :{{tlx|citation needed span|Passage(s) to be sourced}} '''Example of usage:''' :Sourced material. {{tlx|citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be sourced. Another passage to be sourced.}} More sourced material. :Sourced material. {{citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be sourced. Another passage to be sourced.}} More sourced material. '''Compare usage of {{tl|citation needed}}:''' :Sourced material. Passage to be sourced.{{tlx|Citation needed}} Another passage to be sourced.{{tlx|Citation needed}} More sourced material. :Sourced material. Passage to be sourced.{{Citation needed}} Another passage to be sourced.{{Citation needed}} More sourced material. === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}} (or no parameter): The unreferenced content that needs a citation. ;{{para|date}}: The date in the form {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. If omitted, {{U|AnomieBOT}} will add it if there are no new edits for a few minutes. ;{{para|reason}}: The reason for the citation request. If omitted, "This claim needs references to reliable sources." will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "text": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "description": "The text needing a citation", "type": "content", "required": true, "label": "Text", "autovalue": "" }, "reason": { "description": "Reason the text needs a citation; shown in a tooltip", "type": "string", "default": "This claim needs references to reliable sources", "suggested": true, "label": "Reason?" }, "date": { "description": "Month and year the tag was added", "example": "June 2015", "type": "date", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true, "label": "Date" } }, "description": "Marks a specific piece of text as needing a citation.", "paramOrder": [ "text", "date", "reason" ], "format": "inline" } == Categorization of articles == Adding this template to an article places the article into [[:Category:All articles with unsourced statements]], [[:Category:Articles with unsourced statements]], and/or dated subcategories thereof. == Redirects to this template == * {{tl|cns}} * {{tl|cspan}} * {{tl|cnspan}} * {{tl|fact span}} * {{tl|citation span}} * {{tl|citations needed span}} == See also == * {{tl|Citation needed}} – equivalent which does not precisely identify the problematic text * {{tl|Unreferenced section}} – for entire sections requiring [[WP:V|verifiable]] [[WP:RS|references]] / [[WP:CITE|citations]] {{Inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Citation_needed_span%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{template shortcut|cns|cn span|cn-span|Fact span|Fact-span|Reference necessary}} == Usage == The {{tl|citation needed span}} template may be used when there is unsourced text that should be [[WP:CITE|attributed to a reference citation]]. Unlike the template {{tl|citation needed}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging a block of ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing citation, and for singling out ''a specific fact'' that is unsourced among many sourced ones. Avoid use for multiple paragraphs or around a list without closing and opening each template around each paragraph or list item. This kind of use causes [[WP:LINT|linting errors]] and may disrupt the page display. An alternative with multiple paragraphs is {{tlx|unreferenced|section}} or {{tlx|more citations needed|section}}. Once a citation is added, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :{{tlx|citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage(s) to be sourced}}, or: :{{tlx|citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|text=Passage(s) to be sourced}} The date is optional, so the minimal syntax is: :{{tlx|citation needed span|Passage(s) to be sourced}} '''Example of usage:''' :Sourced material. {{tlx|citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be sourced. Another passage to be sourced.}} More sourced material. :Sourced material. {{citation needed span|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|Passage to be sourced. Another passage to be sourced.}} More sourced material. '''Compare usage of {{tl|citation needed}}:''' :Sourced material. Passage to be sourced.{{tlx|Citation needed}} Another passage to be sourced.{{tlx|Citation needed}} More sourced material. :Sourced material. Passage to be sourced.{{Citation needed}} Another passage to be sourced.{{Citation needed}} More sourced material. === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}} (or no parameter): The unreferenced content that needs a citation. ;{{para|date}}: The date in the form {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. If omitted, {{U|AnomieBOT}} will add it if there are no new edits for a few minutes. ;{{para|reason}}: The reason for the citation request. If omitted, "This claim needs references to reliable sources." will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "text": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "description": "The text needing a citation", "type": "content", "required": true, "label": "Text", "autovalue": "" }, "reason": { "description": "Reason the text needs a citation; shown in a tooltip", "type": "string", "default": "This claim needs references to reliable sources", "suggested": true, "label": "Reason?" }, "date": { "description": "Month and year the tag was added", "example": "June 2015", "type": "date", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true, "label": "Date" } }, "description": "Marks a specific piece of text as needing a citation.", "paramOrder": [ "text", "date", "reason" ], "format": "inline" } == Categorization of articles == Adding this template to an article places the article into [[:Category:All articles with unsourced statements]], [[:Category:Articles with unsourced statements]], and/or dated subcategories thereof. == Redirects to this template == * {{tl|cns}} * {{tl|cspan}} * {{tl|cnspan}} * {{tl|fact span}} * {{tl|citation span}} * {{tl|citations needed span}} == See also == * {{tl|Citation needed}} – equivalent which does not precisely identify the problematic text * {{tl|Unreferenced section}} – for entire sections requiring [[WP:V|verifiable]] [[WP:RS|references]] / [[WP:CITE|citations]] {{Inline tags}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
